protein_name: Inhibits primary neurogenesis. May be required to divert neurons along a specific differentiation pathway. Plays a role in the formation of somite boundaries during segmentation of the paraxial mesoderm. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: cell differentiation; negative regulation of Notch signaling pathway; Notch signaling pathway; skeletal system development
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: delta like canonical Notch ligand 3; delta-like 3; delta-like 3 (Drosophila); Delta-like protein 3; Delta3; DLL3; Drosophila Delta homolog 3; SCDO1
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 7.86 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
